title: Fiat 500 parts: airbox grommet & paint pen
summary: Airbox grommet (OEM 71772064) £10.40 at Fiat Direct Parts. Paint pen (166B Verde Lattementa) £19.95 at Touch Up Paint Factory.
body:
AIRBOX GROMMET (part 71772064)
Fiat Direct Parts — £10.40, confirmed in stock
https://fiatdirectparts.co.uk/product/fiat-500-2007-2016-air-box-grommet-1/
Also: search 71772064 on eBay UK for cheaper listings.
Italiparts has it ~£6.50 but was showing out of stock.

PAINT PEN (code 166B, Verde Lattementa)
Touch Up Paint Factory UK — pen £19.95, bottle £16.95
https://touchuppaintfactory.co.uk/products/fiat-500-verde-lattementa-166-166b-touch-up-paint
Cheaper option: Vernicispray.co.uk ~£13
https://www.vernicispray.co.uk/p-117409-2063-touch-up-paint-pen-fiat-italia-lancia-500-166b-verde-latte-e-menta.jsp
Note: paint code is 166B (Verde Lattementa / mint green), not Verde Azzurro.

links.label: Touch Up Paint Factory — paint pen £19.95
